violations.text: Yogurt & granola parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels, with sub-ingredients missing. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the serving area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of several dishware items stored in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The ceiling light covers in the back storeroom area have an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable chopper and tomato slicer, and knives at deli station) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Caulking at coffee shop underneath coffee urn were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Robot coupe base was observed cracked and held with tape. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Lined condensate pipe in walk-in cooler #3 and dishmachine vent was observed with an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
